_comment: Default agent capability registry. Loaded by src/services/agent_capabilities.ts when NEOTOMA_AGENT_CAPABILITIES_JSON and NEOTOMA_AGENT_CAPABILITIES_FILE are unset. Scopes the agent.neotoma.io Netlify forwarder to neotoma_feedback only so a compromised forwarder cannot touch unrelated entity types. See docs/subsystems/agent_capabilities.md for the format.
